title: presla palustris
intro: Presla palustris, also known as Marsh Cotton Grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Presla palustris include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Presla palustris can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical and internal use.
